notes: Owner Activation Gate. Policy activation requires named Owner + explicit signoff. Owner's no is absolute (Rust RFC pattern).

notes: PGI-3.09 Public Philosophy Boundary. Keeps public philosophical statements evidence-bound, non-advice, non-doctrinal, and not publication approval.

title: PGI-3.09 Public Philosophy Boundary
notes: PGI-3.09 closure receipt. PublicPhilosophyStatement validator, fixtures, and tests created. CandidateRule remains advisory only.

notes: PGI all-stage closure report. PGI-1/2/3 locally sealed with validators, fixtures, tests, receipts, and non-authorization boundaries.

title: Checker Maturity Ledger
notes: 38 checker maturity records: 33 grandfathered active records, 3 EGB-2 shadow-tested records, 1 EGB-3 shadow-tested record, and 1 P4 agent-native evidence shadow-tested record. Full pipeline (shadow_test -> red_team -> active) remains explicit before hard-gate promotion.

title: Document Governance Stage Template
notes: Ordivon-CATLASS document governance template. Encodes pre-flight, boundaries, verification, receipt, registry updates, AI onboarding handoff, and EGB-2 record-only freeze protocol.

notes: Ordivon-CATLASS executor. Loads stage templates and enforces pipeline checks; now records EGB-2 freeze_protocol state in dry-run and receipts without blocking on it.

title: Checker Development Stage Template
notes: Stage template for checker development work. EGB-2 adds record-only freeze_protocol state.

title: Artifact Registry
notes: Universal artifact registration for tests (435), scripts (91), domains (107), src (41). 674 artifacts total. Governed by artifact-registry checker.

title: Artifact Registry Checker
notes: Finds unregistered files in tests/, scripts/, domains/, src/. Every new test, script, domain model, or source file must be registered.

title: Ordivon Governance-Application Boundary
notes: Source-of-truth architecture boundary for Ordivon governed layer vs application layer. Clarifies file-by-file registry coverage versus gate-driven application governance.

title: External Engineering Governance Benchmark Plan (EGB-2)
notes: Benchmark-informed governance plan using mature engineering practices from Kubernetes, Rust, Python, Apache, GitHub, Google SRE, DORA, Microsoft SDL, SLSA, OpenSSF, and agent-runtime ecosystems. Reference-only; no compliance, certification, endorsement, partnership, public-standard, production-readiness, or authorization claim.

notes: Versioned external benchmark source registry. Reference-only and internal mapping only; not compliance, certification, endorsement, partnership, equivalence, public-standard, production-readiness, or action authorization evidence.

title: Ordivon Enhancement Proposal Process (EGB-2)
notes: OEP process for high-consequence and cross-boundary Ordivon changes. Evidence for review only; not approval, release permission, merge permission, deployment permission, policy activation, or external action authorization.
